title: Queen memory compatibility namespace lane precheck
delta_summary: colony memory path now normalizes session ids and writes under colony_memory namespace
init_memory_dir accepts migrate_legacy kwarg for compatibility (no-op)
changes are contract-level backward-compat hardening, not behavior expansion

risk_signals.evidence: directory namespace switched from colonies/ to colony_memory/ with slug normalization
risk_signals.impact: callers/tests relying on old path shape may break without compatibility logic

decision_gate: keep_local acceptable if queen memory and session-manager bundles remain green
